mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_question ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY wrong_count DESC, last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY wrong_count DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_question WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (student_id, question_id, student_answer, correct_answer, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, subject_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{wrongCount}, #{lastWrongTime}, #{subjectId})
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question SET student_id = #{studentId}, question_id = #{questionId}, student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, wrong_count = #{wrongCount}, last_wrong_time = #{lastWrongTime}, subject_id = #{subjectId} WHERE wrong_id = #{wrongId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wrong_question WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
